reviews.review_title: At first I was skeptical but....
reviews.review_description: You haven't lived until you experience the glory of multiple virtual tacos being fired out of cannons directly at your face... especially if you have laser eyes.  I'm a huge fan of tacos and this was certainly worth the money spent on it.  It has fun music and a good fun feel to it.   The only thing I would do is slow down the speed on the menu selection.  I ended up picking a mode and playing before I knew what was going on. But it was pretty simple to figure out.  And an online overall leader board might be fun too.  TACOS4EVA.
